title: Raw Mouse Input
description: Directly processes mouse input for improved precision.
body:
## Raw Mouse Input

Directly processes mouse input for improved precision.

---

## Supported Platforms
- Ornithe (1.7.2 - 1.12.2)
- Legacy Fabric (1.7.2 - 1.12.2)

## Looking for Forge?
Unfortunately Forge isn't as friendly to developers. However I've made a similar mod for Forge 1.8.9 if you're interested. You can find that [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/rawinput).
